summary.zh-CN: 变更说明: 完善了 HagiPower / Hero 相关功能与界面，提升角色进度、展示和操作体验。
summary.en: Change Summary: Expanded HagiPower / Hero features and UI to improve progression, presentation, and interaction experience.

bodyHtml.zh-CN:
产品改进

完善了 HagiPower / Hero 相关功能与界面

  • 变更说明: 完善了 HagiPower / Hero 相关功能与界面，提升角色进度、展示和操作体验。
  • 影响范围: 影响 角色与职业元数据、hagipower 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

项目、仓库和工作区相关操作

  • 变更说明: 改进了项目、仓库和工作区相关操作，提升代码定位与切换效率。
  • 影响范围: 影响 project 相关功能、models 相关功能、monospecs 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

补充了配置、接口和多语言等配套支持

  • 变更说明: 补充了配置、接口和多语言等配套支持，提升整体功能可用性。
  • 影响范围: 影响 ai 相关功能、monospecs 相关功能、分布式会话运行时。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

问题修复

add project context to voice recording and fix dependencies相关问题。

  • 变更说明: 修复了add project context to voice recording and fix dependencies相关问题。
  • 影响范围: 影响 界面行为、project 相关功能、models 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 通常不需要额外迁移步骤，这一版本主要改善现有流程的稳定性。

add content normalization for empty titles/messages相关问题。

  • 变更说明: 修复了add content normalization for empty titles/messages相关问题。
  • 影响范围: 影响 notifications 相关功能、ai 相关功能、hagipower 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该条目还包含配套的稳定性或清理工作，用来保证可见行为在新流程下保持可靠。
bodyHtml.en:
Product Improvements

HagiPower / Hero features

  • Change Summary: Expanded HagiPower / Hero features and UI to improve progression, presentation, and interaction experience.
  • Impact: Affects hero and role metadata, Hagipower.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Project

  • Change Summary: Improved project, repository, and workspace actions to make code access and switching more efficient.
  • Impact: Affects Proposal, Project, Models.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Supporting work

  • Change Summary: Added supporting work across configuration, APIs, and localization to improve overall feature readiness.
  • Impact: Affects Ai, Monospecs, distributed session runtime.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Fixes

Issues related

  • Change Summary: Fixed issues related to add project context to voice recording and fix dependencies.
  • Impact: Affects interface behavior, Project, Models.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: No additional migration step is expected; this version mainly improves the reliability of the existing flow.

Issues related

  • Change Summary: Fixed issues related to add content normalization for empty titles/messages.
  • Impact: Affects Notifications, Ai, Hagipower.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: This item also includes supporting stability or cleanup work so the visible behavior stays reliable under the updated flow.
